mcps.purpose: 讓未內建檔案能力的 Agent 在限定專案根目錄內讀寫與搜尋。
mcps.verification: Run MCP initialize and list/read one file in the workspace; do not write during first verification.
mcps.rollback: Remove the provider MCP block and restart the Agent.

mcps.purpose: 在使用者確認後建立 repository、推送成果與查看 deployment 狀態。
mcps.source: provider official GitHub connector or gh CLI fallback
mcps.verification: Check gh auth status, then run a read-only repository query before any write.
mcps.rollback: Disconnect the connector or run gh auth logout only after user confirmation.

mcps.purpose: 閱讀公開資料、測試本機網站或驗收 GitHub Pages。
mcps.verification: Open a public URL or local preview and capture the visible result.

mcps.purpose: 依使用者選擇連接 Gmail、Drive、Calendar、Chat 或 People 的官方遠端 MCP。
mcps.access: product-specific OAuth scopes; choose one least-privilege profile at a time
mcps.verification: Complete provider OAuth in its secure UI, then make one profile-appropriate read-only call before enabling any write action.
mcps.rollback: Remove the provider connector, revoke OAuth consent if required, and disable unused Google Cloud APIs after confirming no other workload needs them.
